scripts.build: pnpm --filter @karasu/core run build && pnpm --filter @karasu/lsp run build && pnpm --filter @karasu/app run build && pnpm --filter @karasu/cli run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @karasu/core run test && pnpm --filter @karasu/app run test && pnpm --filter @karasu/cli run test && pnpm --filter @karasu/lsp run test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @karasu/core run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @karasu/app run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @karasu/cli run test:coverage
